context: Tests whether the agent implements the allocation algorithm correctly: placing geo utilities in lib/geo.js, using haversine distance with the correct Earth radius, scoring all active locations by proximity, preferring single-location fulfillment before falling back to a greedy split, and throwing the right error when stock is insufficient.

checklist.name: geo module path
checklist.description: The distance utility is placed in lib/geo.js (not inline in allocation.js or another path)

checklist.name: haversine formula used
checklist.description: lib/geo.js implements the haversine formula (contains sin, cos, atan2 or equivalent spherical trigonometry)

checklist.name: Earth radius constant
checklist.description: The haversine implementation uses 6371 as the Earth radius (in km)

checklist.name: allocation module path
checklist.description: The allocation logic is placed in lib/allocation.js

checklist.name: haversine import
checklist.description: lib/allocation.js imports the distance function from './geo' (not a third-party library or inline copy)

checklist.name: inventory map built
checklist.description: allocation.js builds a two-level map of locationId -> variantId -> available quantity before scoring locations

checklist.name: proximity sort
checklist.description: Locations are scored by distance to the shipping address and sorted ascending (nearest first) before single or split attempts

checklist.name: single-location tried first
checklist.description: The algorithm iterates sorted locations and attempts to fulfill the full order from one location before considering a split

checklist.name: single result type
checklist.description: When a single location can fulfill the order, the return value has type: 'single'

checklist.name: split fallback
checklist.description: When no single location can fulfill the order, the algorithm falls back to greedy split fulfillment (assigning items to nearest locations with stock)

checklist.name: split result type
checklist.description: The split result has type: 'split' and a fulfillments array with one entry per contributing location

checklist.name: AllocationError thrown
checklist.description: When total stock across all locations is insufficient to fulfill the order, an error is thrown (not a silent failure or null return)

checklist.name: active filter
checklist.description: Only locations with active: true are considered during allocation
